description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the alpine Docker image with a before_script that runs `apk update` and `apk add doxygen`. Add a `pages` job that runs in the default stage, executes `doxygen doxygen/Doxyfile`, then `mkdir -p doxygen/documentation/html`, and finally moves the generated HTML with `mv doxygen/documentation/html/ public/`. Configure the job to publish the `public/` directory as a pages artifact and to run only on the `master` branch.
